## ⚠️ Version Release Policy

When version is complete (user commits "Release V X.Y"):

1. Bundle all phases summary → `docs/versions/v{x}.md`
2. **CLEAR this file** (reset for next version)
3. Delete all `docs/worker-reports/`
4. Keep `docs/features/*` unchanged (specs are permanent)
